cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: abundance, prosperity, security, ambitious, safe, kind, patriarchal, protective, businessman, provider, sensual, reliable

cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: ambitious, diligent, goal oriented, planner, consistent, star student, studious, grounded, loyal, faithful, dependable

cards.name: Ⅲ The Empress, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, overbearing, negligence, smothering, lack of growth, lack of progress
